violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (imitation crab) was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP imitation crab was observed held at 40 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. ROP imitation crab was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). ROP seafood must be completely removed from the package when thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Food was observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit in the refrigerator in the kitchenette on the first floor. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated to the walk-in cooler during time of inspection. Refrigerator was taken out of service during time of inspection and must not be used to store time/temperature control for safety foods until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Food was observed held at 42-45 degrees Fahrenheit in the refrigerator in the kitchenette on the 2nd floor. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated to the walk-in cooler during time of inspection. Refrigerator was taken out of service during time of inspection and must not be used to store time/temperature control for safety foods until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
